horses.name: 1.  Chou De Balia (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Feel the need, the need for speed - this filly has all you need to be a jumping superstar!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Ebalia produced Othello (by I'm Special de Muze) competing in CCI3* eventing.

The grand-dam Nibalia produced Yalambi's Val d'Isere VDL (by Atlantic) at 1.60m and approved in KWPN, Abel Tasman (by Tenerife VDL), Zirocco Royal (by Zirocco Blue VDL), and Jan Diamo R.T. (by Andiamo Z) at 1.45m, as well as L.B. Carrera (by Carrera VDL) at 1.30m.

Chou Blue carries the sought-after Chacco-Blue blood through his sire Chacoon Blue, the second highest-ranked sire in the world, and the highly successful Balou du Rouet on the dam side – a pedigree that clearly breathes world-class show jumping. His full brother Carnegie is approved in Hanover and was named premium stallion. Chou Blue’s granddam and great-granddam have produced numerous successful sport horses, including La Melonga (1.60m). Chou Blue himself completed the SWB Stallion Test with very high marks from both judges and test riders, showing great jumping ability, reaction, and elasticity – test rider Dave Maarse exclaimed, “Amazing horse”! Together with Thomas Ryan, he has already launched a promising sport career with strong results at young horse competitions.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern, Ebalia har lämnat Othello (e. I’m Special de Muze) i CCI3* fälttävlan. 

Mormodern Nibalia har lämnat Yalambi's Val d'Isere VDL (e. Atlantic) i 160 hoppning och godkänd i KWPN, Abel Tasman (e. Tenerife VDL), Zirocco Royal (e. Zirocco Blue VDL) och Jan Diamo R.T. (e. Andiamo Z) i 145 hoppning samt L.B. Carrera (e. Carrera VDL) i 130 hoppning. 

Chou Blues gener med det populära Chacco-Blue-blodet via fadern Chacoon Blue, näst högst rankade fadershingst i världen, och den oerhört avkommemeriterade Balou du Rouet på mödernet andas onekligen hoppning i världsklass. Hans helbror Carnegie

horses.name: 2.  Pregous (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Precious elegance – Parero fire blended with Bellagio grace!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Bellarous descends from a highly accomplished maternal line. Bellarous received a dressage premium as a three-year-old, scoring 9.5 for trot and 9 for canter. She is an Elite  *** performance mare with a dressage index of 145. Her eldest daughter, Gracious (by Grand Galaxy Win), received a dressage premium as a young horse and later was awarded breeding merit A. Voulezvous (by Valverde), Janeirous (by Janeiro Platinum), and Iqarous (by Iron) all received dressage premiums, and Forticious (by For Romance I) has medium-level B dressage competition records.


The grand-dam Jeanious received a dressage premium as a three-year-old, scoring 50 points, and again premium as a four-year-old at the young horse test. She competed in M-level dressage, has a dressage index of 161, and Elite status in breeding. Among her progeny is Despacitous (by Hesselhöj Donkey Boy), awarded dressage premiums at 3- and 4 years, and twice a Breeders Trophy finalist. She also produced Focus (by Floricello), Jiihous (by Jovian), and Soqrateous (by So Perfect), all of which were awarded dressage premiums. Soqrateous sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction 2019.

The great-granddam Bettina received a dressage premium as a three-year-old and is a *** performance mare, with a dressage index of 134. She has produced 14 offspring whose achievements have earned her Elite status. She produced three full siblings by De Niro: Decorous (Grand Prix placings, exported to the US), Dexterous (Intermediaire I), and Delirious (Breeders Trophy and M-level B dressage). Ridiculous (by Blue Hors Romancier) received a dressage premium at the young horse test, placed in the National 3-Year-Old Mare Championships, and competed in M-level dressage. Bettina produced five additional offspring who competed in M-level dressage.

The 5-year-old stallion Parero is approved in several studb

horses.name: 3.  Rock Me Dordogne (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
This colt combines super bloodlines with grace and true potential - he is the brightest of all the stars!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Joviana VH, descends from a successful maternal line in mare family 31, boasting a Grand Prix-merited pedigree (Jovian x Dalwhinnie).

The granddam, Duarda VH, received a dressage premium as a young horse, and has a dressage index of 139.

The great-granddam Uarda V VH received a dressage premium as a young horse, scoring 50 points, dressage index 131, Elite mare. Produced Bowmore VH (by Skovens Rafael), dressage premium, third in Breeders Trophy as 5 & 6-year-old. Also produced Spumante VH (by Springbank II VH), dressage premium as a 3-year-old, winner at the National 3-Year-Old Mare Championships. Daughters Uarda VII (by Springbank II VH) and Orchidea van S (by Franklin) also received dressage premiums.

SWEDISH
Modern Joviana VH härstammar ur en mycket framgångsrik mödernelinje ur stofamilj 31. Hon har en Grand Prix-meriterad stamtavla med mästerskapshingsten Jovian som fader och Dalwhinnie som morfar. 

Mormodern Duarda VH belönades med gångartsdiplom som unghäst och har ett dressyrindex på 139. 

Mormors mor Uarda V VH tilldelades gångartsdiplom som unghäst och belönades med höga 50 poäng. Hon har ett dressyrindex på 131 och är ett Elitsto. Hon har bland annat lämnat Bowmore VH (e. Skovens Rafael) som tilldelats gångartsdiplom. Han har också blivit tredjeplacerad i Breeders Trophy som både 5- och 6-åring. Uarda V har också lämnat Spumante VH (e. Springbank II VH) som fick gångartsdiplom som treåring och segrade i Rikssto. Även döttrarna Uarda VII (e. Springbank II VH) och Orchidea van S (e. Franklin) har tilldelats gångartsdiplom.

horses.name: 4.  Mindful (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Focused and sharp – Mindset powered by the legend Cardento!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
Granddam Winette competed at 1.35m. She produced Mademoiselle H (by It's Possible SRK) at 1.40m.

SWEDISH
Mormodern Winette har tävlat i 135 hoppning. Hon har lämnat Mademoiselle H (e. It's Possible SRK) i 140 hoppning.

horses.name: 5.  Chini con Diamas F (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Be there from first jump to future success - this colt will take you on the journey!

ENGLISH
The dam Diamant v/t Dauwhof has achieved Elite status due to the merits of her offspring. Chini con Carême F (by Carême) and China con Kannan F (by Kannan) both competed in 1.50m. Chini con Londia F (by Nabab de Rêve), Chini con Cumulus F (by Silber Sky F), and Chini con Minas (by Chacfly PS) all received jumping premiums as 3-year-olds with high marks. Chini con Londia produced the approved stallion Chini con Yanic F 1459. Four of her foals have sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auctions. Chini con Candy F (by Conthargos) received an 83.3% score at the foal inspection, the highest in the region.

The grand-dam Westy competed at M-level showjumping. She produced Gazelle v/t Dauwhof (by Cicero van Paemel Z), placed at 1.45m internationally, as well as the approved stallion Jappelloup v/h Dauwhof (by Echo vh Neerenbosch) and Wood-Stock, who has placements in M-level dressage.

With Nicola Pohl, Chac Boy has won both Nations Cup - and Grand Prix - events , and with Irish rider Cian O’Connor, he placed 8th in the Aachen City Region Top Jump at CHIO Aachen.
His sire, the incomparable Chacco-Blue, ranked 2nd on the 2024 WBFSH sire ranking, has 163 approved sons and 219 offspring competing at 1.60m. Chac Boy’s dam, Tailormade Balonie, competed up to 1.50m with Andreas Kreuzer and also produced Chaccobeto, who competes at 1.60m with Emanuele Gaudiano.

SWEDISH
Modern Diamant v/t Dauwhof har nått elitstatus för sina avkommors meriter. Både Chini con Carême F (e. Carême) och China con Kannan F (e. Kannan) har tävlingsmeriter i 150 hoppning. Chini con Londia F (e. Nabab de Reve), Chini con Cumulus F (e. Silber Sky F) och Chini con Minas (e. Chacfly PS) har tilldelats hoppdiplom som 3-åringar med höga betyg för sina hoppegenskaper. Chini con Londia har också lämnat den godkände hingsten Chini con Yanic F 1459. Fyra av hennes avkommor har sålts på SWBs Elitfölauktioner genom åren. Chi

horses.name: 6.  Sally (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
With movements that will knock you out - make your bid now cause' she's ready to excel!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Cindy is entered in the main studbook in Westphalia.

The granddam Freudentänzerin is a state premium mare in Westphalia. She produced daughters who became both state premium mares and Verband premium mares.

The great-granddam Petra is a state premium mare in Westphalia.

Sudooro was the top SWB stallion at the 2023 performance test and later that year qualified for Falsterbo with a score of 86.6%. The following year, he qualified for both Falsterbo and the Breeders Trophy with scores over 85%, reaching the finals at both events. This year, he has started the 6-year-old test with scores over 80%. His dam is a sister to the premium stallion Sundown 1526. Sudooro has been popular with mare owners and has been on SWB’s top stallion list every year since being approved. His sire, Suarez, by Sezuan, was a finalist at the World Young Horse Championships in 2021 and comes from a powerful dam line, where the dam is a full sister to Desperada, dam of the world-class stallion Glock’s Toto Jr. and stallion Valverdos.

SWEDISH
Modern Cindy är intagen i huvudstamboken i Westfalen. 

Mormodern Freudentänzerin är ett Statspremiesto i Westfalen. Hon har lämnat döttrar som blivit både Statspremieston och Verbandspremieston i Westfalen. 

Mormors mor Petra är Statspremiesto i Westfalen.

Sudooro var bästa SWB-hingst på bruksprovet 2023, och senare samma år kvalade han in till Falsterbo med 86,6 %. Året efter kvalade han till Falsterbo och Breeders Trophy med över 85 %, där han gick final vid båda tävlingarna. I år har han startat 6-årsprogrammet med över 80 %. Hans mor är syster till premiehingsten Sundown 1526. Sudooro var populär hos stoägarna och har varit på topplistan i SWB varje år sedan han blev godkänd. Fadern Suarez, efter Sezuan, var unghäst-VM-finalist 2021 och kommer ur ett starkt möderne där

horses.name: 7.  Charles LJ (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Distinctive and bold colt  – Braxton Boyd meets Chirlon charisma!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Ferrero Rocher E represents mare family 23.

The granddam, Ganesca, has a dressage index of 132. She produced Rubins Ganesca (by Heslegård's Rubin), who competed in M-level A dressage, and A Million Dreams E (by Mr Vain GJ), with victory in M-level B dressage.

The great-granddam Queen of the Meadow is an Elite mare. She produced the approved stallion Dantes Vincero GJ 1462 (by Dantes Weltino OLD), who participated in the World Young Horse Championships, placed in young horse classes, and debuted in Intermediaire II dressage. Queen of the Meadow also produced Dressed For Success (by Ferro) and Popular GJ (by Totilas), both of whom have competition records in M-level B dressage. The daughter Jolene GJ (by Heslegård's Rubin) received a dressage premium at the young horse test and participated in the Folksam Scandinavian Open in Falsterbo as a five-year-old. Thriller (by Heslegård's Rubin) also received a dressage premium and competed in M-level A dressage. The daughter, Dark Lady GJ (by Totilas), is the dam of the approved stallion Set the World on Fire GJ 9608 and the granddam of the 2024 performance test winner Devin Franco GJ 1472.

Braxton Boyd GJ (SWB) impressed at his performance test in 2024, earning Premium Stallion status with excellent scores; this year also marks the debut of his first foal crop. He participated in the final of the Breeders Trophy during the SWB Equestrian Weeks, achieving a final score of 87.4%, with test rider Benjamin Werndl awarding 9–9 for both rideability and future potential. His dam, Black Bird, is an Elite Mare and has produced several offspring awarded premiums. His granddam, Amaryllis, is also the granddam of Mr Vain GJ. His sire, Kjento, won the World Young Horse Championships both as a 6- and 7-year-old and now competes in S-level dressage with rider Charlotte Fry.

Charles LJ

horses.name: 8.  Hill's Diaz Blue (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Diablue scope and Cornet Obolensky sharpness – a colt built for the big stage!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Keadonna W. has a SWB breeding index of 127 for showjumping.

The grand-dam Geadonna produced Neymar vd Watermolen (by Fernando-H) at 1.35m and Markies vd Watermolen (by El Clarimo) at 1.30m.

The great-granddam Sterradonna produced Idonna W. and Jolig W. (both by Quidaro), who competed in three-star and two-star international eventing, respectively.

Diablue PS is the first approved son of the double German Champion Diaron, who has already sired nine approved sons, including Diakato PS and Diacentio PS, both of which have been successful in international sport. With Patrick Stühlmeyer, Diaron placed 3rd in the Grand Prix of Opglabbeek.
Diablue PS himself won his stallion performance test in Adelheidsdorf in 2020, receiving a perfect 10 for scope and performance, as well as 9.5 for temperament and overall impression. His dam, Stakkariealla PS, sold for €2.4 million at the P.S.I. Auction in 2017 and went on to compete under Kent Farrington in the USA.

SWEDISH
Modern Keadonna W. har ett avelsindex i SWB för hoppning på 127. 

Mormodern Geadonna har lämnat Neymar vd Watermolen (e. Fernando-H) i 135 hoppning och Markies vd Watermolen (e. El Clarimo) i 130 hoppning. 

Mormors mor Sterradonna har lämnat Idonna W och Jolig W. (båda e. Quidaro) i trestjärnig respektive i tvåstjärnig internationell fälttävlan. 

Diablue PS är den första godkända sonen till den dubble tyske mästaren Diaron. Diaron har redan hunnit lämna 9 godkända söner, bland annat Diakato PS och Diacentio PS, båda i svår internationell hoppning. Han har med Patrick Stühlmeyer bland annat tagit en tredjeplats i Grand Prix i Opglbbeek. Diablue PS segrade vid sitt hingstprov i Adelheidsdorf 2020, där han fick en 10:a av domarna för sitt scope och prestation och 9,5 för temperament och helthetsintryck. Diablue PS mor, Stakkariealla PS såld

horses.name: 9.  Spendoro TE (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Future of show jumping  - with this colt you are ready to conquer the world!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breedrs Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Spenderrilla H-C represents mare family F.1, the Kamburg family. She competed up to 1.35m showjumping.

Singular LS La Silla competed successfully up to international 1.60m level with both Marcus Ehning and Linnea Ericsson Carey. He carries international jumping blood through his sire, Fergar Mail, and further back, Stakkato and Landadel, two giants of German breeding who produced countless top showjumpers. Singular LS La Silla is A-graded in Sweden and was named Challenger Stallion of the Year in 2021. He is the sire of the very successful Iron Dames Singclair (SWB), ridden by Germany’s Sophie Hinners. German-bred Silverstar has achieved success up to 1.50m, and several other offspring are performing successfully in 1.45m.

SWEDISH
Modern Spenderrilla H-C representerar stofamilj F. 1, Kamburg-familjen. Hon har egna tävlingsmeriter i 135 hoppning. 

Singular LS La Silla har tävlingsmeriter i svår internationell 160-hoppning tillsammans med både Marcus Ehning och Linnea Ericsson Carey. Han innehar internationellt hoppblod via fadern Fergar Mail och Stakkato-Landadel längre bak, två fadersgiganter inom tyska hoppaveln som producerat otaliga topphästar i hoppsporten. Singular LS La Silla är A-premierad i Sverige och utsågs 2021 till Årets Utmanarhingst. Han är fader till den mycket framgångsrika Iron Dames Singclair (SWB) som tävlas av tyska Sophie Hinners. Även tyskfödda Silverstar har framgångar i 150 och ytterligare några avkommor har framgångar i 145.

horses.name: 10.  Julia Roberts MVG (80) (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
This pretty woman will shine like a movie star on the intarnationl dressage stages!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Jackie Collins MVG, represents mare family 80, one of our more recent families, coming out of a powerful maternal line that has produced many competition horses in dressage and jumping. Jackie Collins MVG is a *** performance mare, awarded a dressage premium with 51 points as a three-year-old, and has a dressage breeding index of 141. Her 2024 offspring Judy Garland MVG (by Fifty-Fifty) was sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction, scoring 88.3% at foal evaluation.

The grand-dam Jawa has the Swedish Grand Prix stallions Sack and Martini next in her pedigree. She has achieved Elite status for her offspring's accomplishments. Among her progeny is Jon Bon Jovi MVG (by Heslegård's Rubin), who competed up to Intermediaire I dressage. She also produced Jack Sparrow MVG (by Bretton Woods), competing up to Prix St. Georges, and Joan Jett MVG (by Quaterhit), awarded a dressage premium.

The great-granddam Jarrah is an Elite mare. Many of her offspring have been awarded premiums at young horse evaluations. She produced Jackaroo 1095 (by Cortez), approved for breeding, winner of the Breeders Trophy as a six-year-old, with placings in S-level B dressage. She also produced the Elite mare Jambalaya (by Ampere 859) and Jackie (by Kennedy), awarded breeding merit A. Jahromie (by Cortez) competed in M-level B dressage, and Jaffa (by Cortez) in 130 jumping. Janeiro JAZ (by Florencio I) has placings in M-level B dressage.

Söbakkehus First Mover comes from one of Denmark’s strongest dam lines. His granddam, Söbakkehus Mia Bella, won the Danish 4-year-old Championship and then competed successfully at Grand Prix. Her daughters have produced three approved stallions: Söbakkehus First Mover, Hesselhöj Double Up, and Hesselhöj Gnags, the latter being a Premium Stallion and the second most expensive stallion ever at the Herning a

horses.name: 12.  Scarlet's Casalvador (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Bloodlines with performance and power - this colt will be your road to glory!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Scarlet Pimpernel comes from the mare family 6. She was awarded a jumping premium as a 3-year-old, scoring 9 for jumping technique. She participated in the SWB 3-year-old Mare Championships and the 3-Year-Old Championship 2024, placing fourth overall with 87.875 points. Scarlet Pimpernel is a **performance mare with a jumping index of 122.

Great-granddam Sherydan's produced Minelli BS (by Heston for U), placed at 1.30m. 

A living legend. Casall is the stallion who rewrote history, ranked among the world’s Top 15 jumpers for ten consecutive years. His outstanding career includes over 55 placings in CSI5* Grand Prix classes at the 1.60m level – with no fewer than 16 victories. Olympic finalist in London 2012, top placings at both the 2013 European and 2014 World Championships, and 3rd in the World Cup Final in Gothenburg 2016 – Casall’s achievements are that of a top show jumper. His dam Kira’s line goes back to the famous Holsteiner Stamm 890, one of the most influential families in sport horse breeding. Today, Casall continues his legacy as a sire, ranked 11th on the WBFSH Sire Ranking, with offspring such as Chilli Willi, Casello, Oak Grove’s Carlyle, Chesall Zimequest, and many more excelling at the 5* level.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern Scarlet Pimpernel härstammar ur stofamilj 6. Hon tilldelades hoppdiplom som treåring och fick då betyg 9 för sin hoppteknik. Hon deltog i Rikssto och 3-årschampionatet 2024 där hon slutade på en fjärdeplats med 87,875 i totalpoäng. Scarlet Pimpernel är ett ** prestationssto och har ett hoppindex på 122. 

Mormors mor Sherydan's har lämnat Minelli BS (e. Heston for U) som har placeringar i 130 hoppning.

Behöver vi fortfarande presentera denna legend? Casall är stjärnan som skrev historia, med en i

horses.name: 13.  Delight BW (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A flower ready to bloom - this colt will bring home endless victory bouquets!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam, Happinesse, comes from mare family 43 and is an Elite mare. She produced Deveron (by Dragon Welt), Allium (by Danone I), and Avium (by Springbank II VH), all awarded dressage premiums as young horses.

The great-granddam Gazelle received a dressage premium as a three-year-old and was later awarded Elite for her offspring's achievements. She produced Grace (by Majim G) and Fajans (by Figaro R), both of which were awarded dressage premiums. Gyarados (by Sack) received a dressage premium at the young horse test and later placed in Intermediaire I dressage. Gigantine (by Saigon) received premiums as both a jumping and dressage talent as a three-year-old and was later awarded Elite for her offspring’s merits. Zaphire (by Blue Hors Zack) has placings in M-level B dressage.

Racoon placed fifth in the 5-year-old final at the 2022 World Young Horse Championships with 8.82 points, including 9.0 for trot, suppleness, and future potential. He was then purchased by Lövsta Stud, immediately appealing to Swedish breeders, and has been one of the most used dressage sires in recent years. During the 2024–2025 winter season, he competed successfully in Wellington with rider Caroline Darcourt, achieving results up to Intermediaire I. He is licensed in SWB and approved in several other foreign studbooks and has so far produced one approved son. His dam is a sister to two Grand Prix dressage horses and one 1.60m show jumper. His sire, Hero, competes at S-level dressage.

Delight BW received an excellent score of 81,7% at his foal inspection.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern Happinesse härstammar ur stofamilj 43 och är ett Elitsto. Hon har lämnat Deveron (e. Dragon Welt), Allium (e. Danone I) och Avium (e. Springbank II VH) som alla belönats med gångartsdiplom

horses.name: 14.  Valborg EM (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Sired by the shooting star Kathmandu ES Z - this filly is bred for victory!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Ginerva received a jumping premium at her young horse test, scoring 9–9 for jumping.

The grand-dam Georgia was awarded a jumping premium at her young horse test.

The great-granddam Ginny competed up to 1.30m.

Valborg EM received an excellent score of 78,3% at her foal inspection.

The talented 6-year-old Kathmandu ES Z has been successfully campaigned in young horse classes by Nicole Holmén. His dam, Hosanne ES, competed up to 1.45m internationally and has produced three approved sons: Kathmandu, Mindset ES (bronze medalist at the 2022 World Young Horse Championships for 5-year-olds), and Ontario ES (2nd in the 2023 Folksam Open final for 4-year-olds in Falsterbo).
The great-granddam Ilotte (by Pilot) produced two world-renowned approved stallions: Oklund (by Holland), ridden by Eric van der Vleuten, and Plot Blue, successful under Marcus Ehning. Kathmandu’s sire, Kashmir van Schuttershof, was a championship horse himself with Philippe Le Jeune (Belgium) and has sired over 55 approved sons and around 100 offspring competing at 1.60m.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaninig is available

SWEDISH
Modern Ginerva fick hoppdiplom vid sitt unghästtest med betygen 9-9 för sin hoppning. 

Mormodern Georgia tilldelades hoppdiplom vid sitt ridhästtest. 

Mormors mor Ginny har tävlat med meriter i 130 hoppning. 

Valborg EM har visats på fölbedömning och belönats med fina 78,3%

Den nu 6-årige Kathmandu ES Z tävlas med fina resultat i unghästklasser av Nicole Holmén. Hans mor, Hosanne ES har själv tävlat internationell 145-hoppning och är mor till inte mindre än tre godkända söner. Utöver Kathmandu är det också Mindset ES som tog brons-medalj på unghäst VM som 5-åring (2022) och Ontario ES som blev 2:a i finalen i Folksam Open för 4-åriga hästar i Falsterbo 2023. Mormors mor

horses.name: 15.  ExCello WR (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Max out your stable - this colt will go into jumping hall of fame!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Exxica competed up to 1.45m and has a breeding index of 136 in SWB.

The grand-dam Miss Goodwill was awarded Elite in 2016. She produced Atlantica (by Nobel), competing at 1.40m. Heinica (by Stakkato), Ballistica (by Tornesch), Caramant (by Feliciano), and Diabolica (by Cosmeo) all competed at 1.30m.

The great-granddam B-Roxianne produced Stakkato Queen (by Stakkato) at 1.45m.

The Casall-son Cascadello I boasts results up to 1.50m with German rider Dirk Ahlmann. In 2011, he was reserve champion in Neumünster impressing with his outstanding jumping ability. In 2012, he won the performance test in Marbach with top scores: 9.08 for jumping, 9.0 for canter, and 9.0 for conformation.
His offspring are renowned for elegance, athleticism, powerful movement, and a well-shaped topline. Ranked 17th on the WBFSH sire ranking for showjumping stallions in 2024, Cascadello I has produced 28 approved sons and 12 offspring competing at 1.60m, including Cascadello Boy RM, Dublin, Iron Dames Cydello, Carissimo 25, Con Calma, and Canice. His dam, Viviana, has produced three approved sons.

SWEDISH
Moder Exxica har egna meriter i 145 hoppning och har ett avelsindex för hoppning på 136. 

Mormodern Miss Goodwill belönades med Elit 2016. Hon har lämnat Atlantica (e. Nobel) i 140 hoppning. Heinica (e. Stakkato), Ballistica (e. Tornesch), Caramant (e. Feliciano) och Diabolica (e. Cosmeo) har alla tävlat i 130 hoppning. 

Mormors mor B-Roxianne har lämnat Stakkato Queen (e. Stakkato) i 145 hoppning. 

Casall-sonen Cascadello I, har själv placeringar upp till 150-hoppning med Tyska Dirk Ahlmann. 2011 blev han reservsegrare i Neumünster, där han imponerade med sin enastående hoppning. 2012 vann han HLP i Marbach med drömpoängen 9,08 för hoppning, 9,0 för galopp och 9,0 för exteriör. Hans avkommor kännetecknas av elegans, atletisk l

horses.name: 16.  Cristalls Ficaccio (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Golden heritage – Iowa Gold meets For Romance refinement!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The grand-dam Slaebaekgård's Fallulah received a bronze medal in Denmark and achieved Elite status. She produced Slaebaekgård's Minelli (by Millennium), highly scored in Denmark for both conformation and gaits.

The great-granddam Slaebaekgård's Cathía is the dam of J Samia (by Samarant), who participated in the Danish 4-year-old championship. She also produced Slaebaekgård's Santiano (by Sir Donnerhall I), who competed in the Danish young horse championship and has victories in Grand Prix dressage. Nephew (by Negro) and Slaebaekgård's Fritz (by For Romance I) have placings in M-level B dressage.

Iowa Gold descends from the exceptionally successful mare Weihegold, who, together with Isabell Werth, has won nearly every possible medal in international dressage. Beyond her competitive achievements, she has been highly successful as a broodmare. Notable offspring and consecutive generations include the championship stallion Total Hope OLD and the premium stallions L’Avenir, Viva Gold OLD, Damon Gold, For Gold, and many others. Iowa Gold completed his performance test in Neustadt-Dosse with an impressive score of 8.79, receiving a 9 for temperament, work ethic, and rideability. His sire, Asgard’s Ibiza, has produced over 30 approved sons and numerous successful sport horses progressing to higher levels.

SWEDISH
Mormodern Slaebaekgård's Fallulah har fått bronsmedalj i Danmark och även nått elitstatus. Hon har lämnat Slaebaekgård’s Minelli (e. Millennium) som bedömts i Danmark med höga betyg på både exteriör och gångarter. 

Mormors mor Slaebaekgård's Cathía är moder till J Samia (e. Samarant) som deltagit i det danska 4-årschampionatet. Hon har också lämnat Slaebaekgård’s Santiano (e. Sir Donnerhall I) som deltagit i det danska unghästchampionatet och har segrar i Grand Prix dressyr. Nephew (e. Negro) och Slaebaekgård’s Fritz (e. For

horses.name: 17.  Rill's Jump for Gold (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Golden jumps ahead – Diarado precision with Heartbeat drive!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Amorina Heart represents mare family 8. She was awarded a jumping premium at the young horse test. 
She placed fourth in Breeders Trophy as a 6-year-old and has competition merits in CCI2* eventing.

The grand-dam Amica Ragazzo competed in CCN2* eventing.

Rill's Jump for Gold received an excellent score of 78,9% at his foal inspection.

SWEDISH
Modern Amorina Heart representerar stofamilj 8. Hon har belönats med hoppdiplom vid ridhästtest. Hon blev fjärdeplacerad i Breeders Trophy som 6-åring och har tävlingsmeriter i CCI2* fälttävlan. 

Mormodern Amica Ragazzo  har tävlat till och med CCN2* fälttävlan. 

Rill's Jump for Gold har visats på fölbedömning och belönats med fina 78,9%.

horses.name: 18.  Buddyplexx Myosotis
horses.catalog_text:
The sky is the limit for this colt - invest in tomorrow's champion!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Bonett represents mare family 33. She was awarded a dressage premium as a young horse and is a **performance mare.

The grand-dam Bedoora produced Be Easy (by Quite Easy) and Brother (by For Feeling), both awarded dressage premiums as 3-year-olds. Bedoora also produced the daughter Bigley, who achieved Elite status due to the merits of her offspring.

The great-granddam Bonanza is an Elite mare. She produced 13 offspring, 11 of whom were sired by Pascal. Among these, Bon Aqua competed in M-level dressage. Blizzard, Bonny, and Bombastic were awarded jumping premiums at the young horse test, while Bagliore received a dressage premium. Bonanza also produced the daughter Ballerina, awarded Elite as a broodmare.


The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Bonett representerar stofamilj 33. Hon belönades med gångartsdiplom som unghäst och är ett ** prestationssto. 

Mormodern Bedoora har lämnat Be Easy (e. Quite Easy) och Brother (e. For Feeling) som tilldelades gångartsdiplom som 3-åringar. Bedoora har också lämnat dottern Bigley som verkat i aveln och nått elitstatus tack vare sina avkommors meriter. 

Mormors mor Bonanza är ett Elitsto som lämnat 13 avkommor, varav 11 efter hingsten Pascal. Bland dessa har Bon Aqua tävlat till och med medelsvår dressyr. Blizzard, Bonny och Bombastic har tilldelats hoppdiplom vid unghästbedömningar och Bagliore har belönats med gångartsdiplom. Bonanza har också lämnat dottern Ballerina som är ett Elitsto. 

Uppstallning / lösdrift erbjuds efter avvänjning

horses.name: 19.  Dollybous (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Elegance meets power in this exceptional filly - an exciting combination coursing through her veins!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Herzeous received dressage premiums as both a three- and four-year-old and was awarded a score of 9 for trot and canter. She has competed with wins and placings in Intermediaire I dressage, is a *** performance mare, and has a dressage index of 153. Among her offspring is the Elite mare Filiocous (by Floricello), also awarded a dressage premium as a young horse.

The grand-dam D'Amorous received a jumping premium at her young horse test. She has a dressage index of 133, is a *** performance mare, and is awarded merit A in breeding. She also has competition merits in M-level dressage. The offspring Heartlous and Hazardous (by Herzensdieb) both competed in M-level dressage.

The great-granddam Wounder xx is an Elite mare. She produced Particious (by Pablo) and Zous (by Blue Hors Zack), who competed in M-level dressage. Wounder xx is also the dam of Joyous (by Johnson), who received a dressage premium at the young horse test.

Premium Stallion as well as winner of the Aage Ravns Trophy for the best 4-year-old in Denmark. His full brother Down Town won gold at the World Young Horse Championships as a 5-year-old and silver as a 6-year-old with Jeanna Högberg in the saddle. From his first foal crop, Donkey Boss produced the son Daan G, who sold for 2 million euros at the 2024 Oldenburg stallion auction, becoming the most expensive premium stallion in many years. His sire, Donkey Boy, competed in Grand Prix dressage but is perhaps best known for his successful offspring, who have won countless medals at young horse championships and he has produced more than 10 approved sons.

Dollybous received an excellent score of 87,2% at her foal inspection.


SWEDISH
Modern Herzeous tilldelades gångartsdiplom som både 3- och 4-åring och har belönats med betyg 9 på trav och galopp. Hon har tävlat

horses.name: 20.  Bifidus (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A balanced colt – Bon Esprit and Kjento in pure harmony!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Relaxantia received a dressage premium as a three-year-old and was awarded a score of 9 for type and trot. She has a dressage index of 155, and this is her first offspring.

The grand-dam Queen received a dressage premium as a young horse and was awarded a score of 10 for trot. She is a *** performance mare, has a high dressage index of 164, and received Elite status for her offspring's achievements. Queen produced the daughters Lejondals Rétina and Rima (by Skovens Rafael), both of whom have been awarded dressage premiums and hold competition records in Intermediaire I dressage. Dilutio (by Dimaggio) received premiums as both a jumping and dressage talent, and Discus (by Dream Boy) and Queen of Quality (by Kintaro VDL) received dressage premiums. Discus was also third-placed in the 3-year-old championship in 2024. Queen is also the dam of Selektion (by Secret), who represented Sweden at the World Breeding Championships for young horses at both 5 - and 6 - years old.

The great-granddam Santana is a state premium mare in Hanover. She produced Queen of Joy (by Quaterback), who competed in M-level dressage.

Bon Esprit was named Champion Stallion in Oldenburg 2025 and went on to win his performance test the following year with a score of 8.3. He is approved in several studbooks, and his offspring have sold for high prices across Europe. His dam competed successfully at Prix St. Georges level, and the dam line has produced several top-level sport horses, including Deveraux OLD, Rolls Roys, Sambuca, Don Rovero, and Flemming. The licensed stallion Roosevelt (by Rotspon) contributes Olympic heritage to the pedigree and is known in Sweden primarily as the sire of Grand Prix horses Rolecz and Sibelius 1315, the latter also being a licensed stallion. Bon Esprit’s sire, Bon Courage, has already produced 13 approved sons and competes him

horses.name: 21.  Cikoria af Hagalund (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A pedigree with Grand Prix merits and upcoming premium stallions  - this filly will go all the way!

Breeders Tropy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLIS
The dam Chakan has a SWB breeding index for showjumping of 129. She produced Sambucus af Hagalund at 1.35m, Uniola af Hagalund (by Cornet Obolensky), and Verbena af Hagalund (by I'm Special de Muze), with SWB breeding indexes of 132 and 137, respectively. Additionally, Wallmo af Hagalund (by Casall), Akantus af Hagalund (by Chacoon Blue), and Buxus af Hagalund (by Cardento) all have sold at the SWB Elite Foal Auctions.

The grand-dam Chanel v/t Nieuwenhof Z competed up to 1.50m.

The powerful jumper Uricas v/d Kattevennen has achieved results in 1.65m, including the Olympic Games in Paris, with Dutch team rider Harrie Smolders. His sire Uriko competed in 1.50m, and his pedigree includes the well-known Cassini I and Caretino, two stallions who have been leading names in European breeding for decades. Uricas’s half-brother My Way (by Mylord Carthago) has results in 1.60m. His granddam, Chika’s Way, also competed up to the 1.60m level.

SWEDISH
Moder Chakan har ett avelsindex för hoppning i SWB på 129. Hon har lämnat Sambucus af Hagalund i 135 hoppning, Uniola af Hagalund (e. Cornet Obolensky) och Verbena af Hagalund (e. I’m Special de Muze) som har avelsindex i SWB för hoppning på 132 respektive 137. Vidare har avkommorna Wallmo af Hagalund (e. Casall), Akantus af Hagalund (e. Chacoon Blue) och Buxus af Hagalund (e. Cardento) sålts vid SWBs Elitfölauktioner. 

Mormodern Chanel v/t Nieuwenhof Z har egna meriter i 150 hoppning.

Storhoppande Uricas v/d Kattevennen har tävlingsmeriter i 165 hoppning tillsammans, bland annat från OS i Paris, med holländske landslagsryttaren Harrie Smolders. Fadern Uriko har placeringar i 150 hoppning och därefter följer välkända Cassini I och Caretino, två hingstar som under åren varit tongivande i europeisk hoppavel. Uricas v/d Kattevennens halvbror My Way (e.

horses.name: 22.  Ryttersbergs Spitfire (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Not even the sky is the limit  - this colt is born to win and is just for you!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Lily Fire S is a **performance mare representing mare family 46 (Bojan/Piledals family). She has competition merits at 1.30m.

The grand-dam Starfire S was awarded premium as a young horse and is an A-premium broodmare. She produced Starfire S and Callisto Fire S (both by Cosmopolite S) and Quincy Fire S (by Quite Easy), all competing at 1.30m. Crissfire S (by Cosmopolite S) and Top Fire S (by Topaasch) competed in M-level A dressage. Starfire S also produced Flashfire S (by Cosmopolite S), who received a jumping premium as a 3-year-old.

The great-granddam Spring-Fire S was awarded Elite in SWB in 2005. She produced Bonfire S (by Cortez), competing at 1.40m, and Gunfire S (by Corall), who received a double premium as a young horse. 

I’m Extra’s breeder is Stall Bengtsson in Germany. His dam Elika competed up to 1.40m with Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. The granddam Milka produced three approved stallions as well as Kuschel’s Ulika, who jumped at 1.60m level with Evi Bengtsson. His sire, I’m Special de Muze, has 35 approved sons and nine offspring competing at 1.60m. He comes from a highly accomplished dam line, where both his dam, Exquis Walnut de Muze, and his granddam, Qerly Chin, and great-granddam, Kerly, competed internationally at 1.60m.

Ryttersbergs Spitfire received an excellent score of 83,3% at his foal inspection.

SWEDISH
Modern Lily Fire S är ett **prestationssto som representerar stofamilj 46, Bojan/Piledals-familjen. Hon har egna tävlingsmeriter i 130 hoppning. 

Mormodern Starfire S tilldelades diplom som unghäst och är A-premierad. Hon har lämnat Starfire S och Callisto Fire S (båda e. Cosmopolite S) och Quincy Fire S (e. Quite Easy) i 130 hoppning. Vidare har Crissfire S (e. Cosmopolite S) och Top Fire S (e. Topaasch) tävlat i medelsvår A dressyr. Starfire S har också lämnat Flashfire S

horses.name: 23.  Für Immer MVG LVST (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
An entertainer with the right moves -  this colt can be your own young horse champion!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Für Dich received a dressage premium as a young horse. She has placings in M-level B dressage and is a *** performance mare. She has a dressage index of 134. Her daughter, Daenerys Targaryen (by Deodoro), participated in the Breeders Trophy as a four-year-old.

The great-granddam Wadai is a state premium mare in Hanover. She produced Walona (by Wolkentanz I), also a state premium mare. Wadai's full sister Wyella produced the approved stallion Laurentio (by Lauries Crusador xx) as well as several competition horses in S-level dressage and CCI*** eventing. 

Racoon placed fifth in the 5-year-old final at the 2022 World Young Horse Championships with 8.82 points, including 9.0 for trot, suppleness, and future potential. He was then purchased by Lövsta Stud, immediately appealing to Swedish breeders, and has been one of the most used dressage sires in recent years. During the 2024–2025 winter season, he competed successfully in Wellington with rider Caroline Darcourt, achieving results up to Intermediaire I. He is licensed in SWB and approved in several other foreign studbooks and has so far produced one approved son. His dam is a sister to two Grand Prix dressage horses and one 1.60m show jumper. His sire, Hero, competes at S-level dressage.

The option to have the foal stay with the breedera after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Für Dich belönades med gångartsdiplom som unghäst. Hon har placeringar i medelsvår B dressyr och är ett *** prestationssto. Hon har ett dressyrindex på 134. Dottern Daenerys Targaryen (e. Deodoro) deltog i Breeders Trophy som 4-åring. 

Mormors mor Wadai är ett Statspremiesto i Hannover. Hon har lämnat Walona (e. Wolkentanz I) som också är ett Statspremiesto. Wadais helsyster Wyella har lämnat den godkände hingsten Laurentio (e. Lauries Crusador xx) samt ett flerta

horses.name: 24.  ConMorricon DH (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
This colt shows grace and true potential - he can be the  brightest of all the stars!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders-Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Concordia V (20) represents mare family 20. She produced Chanel DH (by Morricone), awarded premiums as both a dressage and jumping talent at the young horse test, and participated in the National 3-Year-Old Mare Championships, finishing ninth. She also produced Chloé DH (by Franklin), a premium foal in 2023.

The grand-am Concordia IV is by the well-known dressage sire Don Primero and received a dressage premium as a three-year-old. She was awarded breeding merit A. Among her offspring is Con Star (by Shooting Star), who received a dressage premium with scores of 10 for trot and 9 for canter. Concordia IV also produced Con Corazon DH (by Springbank II VH), who competed in M-level B dressage.

The great-granddam, Concordia III, is an Elite mare. Her daughter Chanel (by Magritte) received a premium as a four-year-old, and Con-Man (by Weltman) and Con Carlos (by Blue Hors Hertug) competed in M-level dressage.

Morricone I comes from a strong dam line with two approved full brothers, all of whom compete at S-level dressage. Among the siblings of his dam and granddam are S-level horses and approved stallions. Morricone has already produced Grand Prix offspring and more than 30 approved sons. In Sweden, he is perhaps best known through his sons Morricello II and III, with Morricello II placing third at last year’s Breeders Trophy and winning the Stallion Trophy. Morricone himself was Champion Stallion in Oldenburg in 2014, he won his 30-day test with 9.33 points, and has since competed in Grand Prix dressage. His sire, Millennium, has nearly 100 approved sons and 17 offspring competing at Grand Prix level.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern Concordia V (20) representerar stofamilj 20. Hon har lämnat Chanel DH (e. Morricone) som tilldelats d

horses.name: 25.  Miracle Star ES (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A true miracle – Diablue combined with Cornet Obolensky brilliance!

Breeders Trophy-anlsuten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Cornet's Northern Star has merits at 1.30m.

The grand-dam Acadia produced Radscha (by Renegade Z) at 1.45m, and Rivera (by Renegade Z) and Flommy Fly (by Fortsyth), who competed at 1.35m.

The great-granddam Virginia competed at 1.35m.

Diablue PS is the first approved son of the double German Champion Diaron, who has already sired nine approved sons, including Diakato PS and Diacentio PS, both of which have been successful in international sport. With Patrick Stühlmeyer, Diaron placed 3rd in the Grand Prix of Opglabbeek.
Diablue PS himself won his stallion performance test in Adelheidsdorf in 2020, receiving a perfect 10 for scope and performance, as well as 9.5 for temperament and overall impression. His dam, Stakkariealla PS, sold for €2.4 million at the P.S.I. Auction in 2017 and went on to compete under Kent Farrington in the USA.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available

SWEDISH
Modern Cornet’s Northern Star har tävlingsmeriter i 130 hoppning. 

Mormodern Acadia har lämnat Radscha (e. Renegade Z) i 145 hoppning samt Rivera (e. Renegade Z) och Flommy Fly (e. Fortsyth) som tävlat i 135-klasser. 

Mormors mor Virginia har egna meriter i 135 hoppning.

Diablue PS är den första godkända sonen till den dubble tyske mästaren Diaron. Diaron har redan hunnit lämna 9 godkända söner, bland annat Diakato PS och Diacentio PS, båda i svår internationell hoppning. Han har med Patrick Stühlmeyer bland annat tagit en tredjeplats i Grand Prix i Opglbbeek. Diablue PS segrade vid sitt hingstprov i Adelheidsdorf 2020, där han fick en 10:a av domarna för sitt scope och prestation och 9,5 för temperament och helthetsintryck. Diablue PS mor, Stakkariealla PS såldes för 2,4 miljoner euro på P.S.I auktionen till USA 2017, där hon tävlats av Kent Farrington. 

Uppstallning / lösdrift e

horses.name: 26.  MAJ Sinclair Tricket (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Quick-thinking and clever colt – Singular blood with Quite Easy flair!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Felicia Tricket is a *performance mare with competition merits in M-level showjumping.

The grand-dam Kristien produced Alissa (by Solos Carex), competing in M-level dressage.

Singular LS La Silla competed successfully up to international 1.60m level with both Marcus Ehning and Linnea Ericsson Carey. He carries international jumping blood through his sire, Fergar Mail, and further back, Stakkato and Landadel, two giants of German breeding who produced countless top showjumpers. Singular LS La Silla is A-graded in Sweden and was named Challenger Stallion of the Year in 2021. He is the sire of the very successful Iron Dames Singclair (SWB), ridden by Germany’s Sophie Hinners. German-bred Silverstar has achieved success up to 1.50m, and several other offspring are performing successfully in 1.45m.


SWEDISH
Moder Felicia Tricket är ett *prestationssto med egna meriter i medelsvår hoppning. 

Mormoder Kristien har lämnat Alissa (e. Solos Carex) i medelsvår dressyr. 

Singular LS La Silla har tävlingsmeriter i svår internationell 160-hoppning tillsammans med både Marcus Ehning och Linnea Ericsson Carey. Han innehar internationellt hoppblod via fadern Fergar Mail och Stakkato-Landadel längre bak, två fadersgiganter inom tyska hoppaveln som producerat otaliga topphästar i hoppsporten. Singular LS La Silla är A-premierad i Sverige och utsågs 2021 till Årets Utmanarhingst. Han är fader till den mycket framgångsrika Iron Dames Singclair (SWB) som tävlas av tyska Sophie Hinners. Även tyskfödda Silverstar har framgångar i 150 och ytterligare några avkommor har framgångar i 145.

horses.name: 27.  High Protector (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Take a leap above the rest - this colt is destined to raise the bar in jumping!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The Grand-dam High Divine competed up to 1.40m and is an A-premium **performance mare with a breeding index of 125 for showjumping. She produced High Nitro (by VDL Empire) at 1.60m.

The great-granddam High Justice was awarded Elite in 2009. She produced High Tech (by New Balance), competing at 1.50m. This mare family also generated High Stepper (by Cortez) and High Yummy (by New Balance), both very successful at 1.60m internationally with Maria Gretzer and Alexander Zetterman respectively.

Chaccafly CL was named Stallion Performance Test Winner in 2023. His conformation was described as noble, long lined, with a natural elevation of the topline. Test riders praised him as energetic and cooperative, and confident with quick reactions. His dam Evista also produced the approved stallion Cevisto, currently competing at 1.35m. His granddam Von Cim competed up to 1.55m level and produced the approved stallion Quim (by Quiwi Dream), who has results at 1.50m with Germany’s Janne Friederike Meyer-Zimmermann. His sire Chacfly PS won his stallion performance test in 2015 with an outstanding 9.49 score for jumping, receiving six 10s and 9.5 for rideability from both judges and test riders.


SWEDISH
Mormoder High Divine har egna tävlingsmeriter i 140 hoppning. Hon är ett A-premierat och **prestationssto med ett avelsindex för hoppning på 125. Hon har lämnat High Nitro (e. VDL Empire) i 160 hoppning.

Mormors mor High Justice belönades med Elit 2009. Hon har lämnat High Tech (e. New Balance) i 150 hoppning. Ur stostammen kommer även bland annat High Stepper (e. Cortez) och High Yummy (e. New Balance) som varit mycket framgångsrika i internationell 160 hoppning tillsammans med Maria Gretzer och Alexander Zetterman. 

Chaccafly CL utsågs till Bruksprovsvinnare 2023. Exteriören bedömdes som ädel, långlinjerad med naturl

horses.name: 28.  Hetfield LVST (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A rockstar by blood – Bon Coeur energy with Kremlin MD fire!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Metallica received a dressage premium as a young horse with 49 points and has a dressage index of 134.

The grand-dam Zara is an Elite *** performance mare with a dressage index of 131. Among her offspring are ZZ Top (by Zuidenwind), sold at SWB's Elite Foal Auction and later placed fifth in the Breeders Trophy for four-year-olds. Zara also produced Thin Lizzy (by Majestic Taonga), who received a dressage premium.

The great-granddam, Julia, is an Elite mare who produced 13 offspring. Vera Wang (by Suarez) made the finals in the Young Horse Championships in dressage and represented Sweden at the World Young Horse Championships in Verden with Mikaela Alderin. Odd Molly (by Zuidenwind) received a dressage premium as a three-year-old, placed in the 3-year-old championship, and in the Breeders Trophy as both a four- and five-year-old. Don Dior (by Blue Hors Don Romantic) received a dressage premium and has placings in M-level dressage. Donna Karan (by Zuidenwind) was in the Breeders Trophy final as a six-year-old and has placings in M-level B dressage.

Bon Coeur has consistently performed at the top of his generation year after year. He was named Premium Stallion in Verden in 2014 and won his 30-day test in Schlieckau with an outstanding 9.1 for gaits and several 10s in the protocol. He earned a 9.0 for rideability when qualifying for the Bundeschampionat and was vice-Bundeschampion as both a three- and four-year-old. In 2017, he received the prestigious Weltmeyer Prize for his achievements. In Sweden, he impressed immediately with 93% in the 6-year-old program with Caroline Darcourt, becoming first reserve for the German team at the World Young Horse Championships. He has also competed up to the international Intermediaire I level, achieving wins and placings. Bon Coeur has produced numerous offspring, competing at both the

horses.name: 29.  Azizam RM (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Precious as her name – Favorit Ask and Numero Uno created this jewel!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The grand-dam Titia has received the predicates Elite, Pref, Prest, and Prok in KWPN. She has produced Also Special (by Argentinus) competing at 1.60m showjumping, Modena K.P. Especiale (by Bubalu VDL) at 1.45m, and Zontender (by Montender) at 1.40m, as well as Divina Z (by Dominator 2000 Z), who has a SWB breeding index of 135 for showjumping. 

The great-granddam Erica (Vink Especiale) successfully competed at 1.60m together with Eric van der Vleuten. She produced Andiamo Special (by Andiamo Z), competing at 1.30m.

Favorit Ask was named the undisputed champion stallion in the class for 5-year-old and older stallions at the Danish Stallion Licensing in Herning, after winning his 35-day test with an outstanding score of 901.5. He was described as a very modern stallion with interesting bloodlines, long legs, and exceptional capacity. Among his offspring are Folsom, QH Miss Potter do Santo Antonio, First Choice HT, and Hennie Ask – all competing at international 1.60m level. His dam Ukase ter Putte also produced the approved stallion Elvis ter Putte, who competed up to 1.60m and has produced several international 1.60m horses, including the approved stallion Mosito van het Hellehof.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Mormodern Titia har erhållit predikaten Elite, Pref, Prest och Prok i KWPN. Hon har lämnat Also Special (e. Argentinus) i 160 hoppning, Modena K.P. Especiale (e. Bubalu VDL) i 145 hoppning och Zontender (e. Montender) i 140 hoppning samt Divina Z (e. Dominator 2000 Z) som har ett avelsindex för hoppning i SWB på 135. 

Mormors mor Erica (Vink Especiale) har tävlat framgångsrikt i 160 tillsammans med Eric van der Vleuten. Hon har lämnat Andiamo Special (e. Andiamo Z) i 130 hoppning.

Favorit Ask utsågs till överlägsen championhingst i klassen för 5-år

horses.name: 30. Northern Drumstick (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A colt with his own beat – Drummer rhythm meets Stakkato punsch! 

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Northern Euphoria is a **performance mare who was awarded a jumping premium at her young horse test. She has a SWB breeding index of 129 for showjumping. Among her offspring is Northern Exstacy (by Eldorado van de Zeshoek), who received a jumping premium with a perfect 10–10 score, and Northern Barony LVST (by El Barone 111 Z), who sold at SWB’s Elite Foal Auction 2024. 

The grand-dam Eve la Fleur, a successful broodmare; was awarded Elite in 2013 and has a breeding index for jumping of 124 in SWB. She produced Northern Skyfall (by Stakkato) at 1.50m, Sweet Northern (by Stakkato) at 1.45m, Stakko (by Stakkato) at 1.40m, and Chembassy (by Chacoon Blue) at 1.30m, both approved stallions in Hannover. 

The great-granddam Carola was awarded Elite in SWB in 2012. She produced Northern Diamond (by Diamant de Revel), winner of Breeders Trophy as a 5-year-old and later competing at 1.60m. Northern Caramelle (by Lord Z) was placed in the Breeders Trophy final as a 5-year-old. Enchilada PJ (by Escudo I) and Northern Quality (by Quality Time TN) both competed at 1.30m. Enjoy Northern (by Escudo) received a double premium as a 3-year-old and later competed at 1.30m.


SWEDISH
Modern Northern Euphoria är ett **prestationssto som belönades med hoppdiplom vid sitt unghästtest. Hon har ett avelsindex i SWB för hoppning på 129. Bland hennes avkommor finns Northern Exstacy (e. Eldorado van de Zeshoek) som fick hoppdiplom och högsta betyg 10-10 för sin hoppning vid sitt unghästest och Northern Barony LVST (e. e. El Barone 111 Z) som såldes vid SWB Elitfölauktion 2024. 

Mormodern Eve la Fleur är ett framgångsrikt avelssto som premierades Elit 2013 och har ett avelsindex för hoppning i SWB på 124. Hon har lämnat Northern Skyfall (e. Stakkato) i 150 hoppning, Sweet Northern (e. Stakkato) i 145 hoppning, Stakko (e. Stakkato) i 140 hop

horses.name: 31.  Rogestorps Porsche (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Next level talent running through his vains - grab an ultimate jumping prospect!

ENGLISH
The dam Orina achieved EPTM 81 points in jumping in KWPN. 

The grand-dam Varina produced Bas (by Cartano) at 1.55m and Fortuna (by Chello III) at 1.50m. She also produced Grunn (by Corland) and Joapke (by Arezzo VDL) at 1.35m, as well as Larina (by Arezzo VDL), awarded Elite IBOP jumping in KWPN. 

The great-granddam Isarina is Elite IBOP jumping in KWPN. She produced Sarina (by Mr Blue) at 1.50m. She also produced Blokum (by Cardento) at 1.35m, and Zinnig (by Chin Chin) and Nirina (by Caritas) at 1.30m.

Pink Floyd VDL was named Stallion Performance Test Winner in 2024. He was awarded a 9 for type and 9.5–9.5 from the test riders. Pink Floyd VDL comes from a very accomplished mare family. His dam, Cella, won team gold and individual silver at the European Championships in Herning in 2013 with Ben Maher. Cella has produced three approved sons, including Happy Wandor van’t Roosakker, with placings in 5* 1.60m classes. The granddam Usha van’t Roosakker competed up to 1.50m and produced two approved sons as well as four offspring competing at 1.60m level. His sire, Conthargos, has 69 approved sons and 37 offspring at the 1.60m level.

Rogestorps Porsche received an excellent score of 77,6% at his foal inspection.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern Orina har EPTM 81 poäng hoppning i KWPN. 

Mormoder Varina har lämnat Bas (e. Cartano) i 155 hoppning, Fortuna (e. Chello 111) i 150 hoppning. Hon är också moder till Grunn (e. Corland) och Joapke (e. Arezzo VDL) i 135 hoppning samt Larina (e. Arezzo VDL) som belönats med Elite IBOP hoppning i KWPN. 

Mormors mor Isarina är Elite IBOP hoppning i KWPN. Hon har lämnat Sarina (e. Mr Blue) i 150 hoppning. Vidare har hon lämnat Blokum (e. Cardento ) i 135 klasser samt Zinnig (e. Chin Chin) och Nirina (e. Caritas) i 130 hoppning. 

Pink Floyd VDL utsågs till Bru

horses.name: 32.  Julie (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
A pedigree that contains all you wish for - this filly is guaranteed to make you smile in every step!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Fame I.M is a daughter of the championship stallion Total Hope, who recently competed at the European Championship final in dressage with Isabel Freese. 

The grand-dam Florence WM has a dressage index of 121. Produced Forentino (by Flash Dancer I.M.), awarded a dressage premium as a young horse. 

The great-granddam, Red Rum, received a dressage premium as a young horse, and has a dressage index of 124. Produced Hope IM (by Rubinrot) and Quo Vadis I.M. (by Quaterback), that have competed in M-level dressage. Redford I.M (by Luxus CML) placed in M-level B dressage, Intill Icicle (by Ironman H) placed second in Breeders Trophy as a 4-year-old.

Kjento won both the 6- and 7-year-old classes at the World Young Horse Championships in 2021–2022, both times with Charlotte Fry in the saddle. In the 6-year-old final in 2021, he scored an exceptional 96%, with 10s for trot, canter, and rideability. Today, he competes in S-level dressage with championship ambitions. He comes from a strong dam line with approved brothers, and his dam has competed successfully at the M- level in dressage. Kjento has also proven himself as a sire. In Sweden, his best-known sons include the premium stallions Pjethro, Braxton Boyd GJ, and TMD’s I Don’t Care. His sire, Negro, has made a significant impact on the dressage world as a sire, including producing Valegro, and as a grandsire through horses such as Glamourdale.


SWEDISH
Modern Fame I.M är en dotter till mästerskapshingsten Total Hope som nyligen deltog i EM-finalen i dressyr tillsammans med Isabel Freese. 

Mormodern Florence WM har ett dressyrindex på 121. Hon har lämnat Forentino (e. Flash Dancer I.M.) som tilldelats gångartsdiplom som unghäst. 

Mormors mor Red Rum tilldelades gångartsdiplom som unghäst och har ett dressyrindex på 124. Hon har

horses.name: 33.  Blue Ink TG (SWB)
horses.catalog_text:
Written for the big jumps – Caribbean Blue scope with Zambesi drive!

Breeders Trophy-ansluten / Eligible for Breeders Trophy

ENGLISH
The dam Goïnka has competition merits at 1.30m level. 

The grand-dam Idylle produced several offspring competing at S-level: Sterrehof’s Edinus (by Padinus) at 1.60m, Catinka 19 (by Ovidius) and Aminka (by Sam R) at 1.50m, as well as Vanda Vuitton (by SIEC Vigaro) and Undiamo (by Andiamo) at 1.45m. Idylle also produced Forinka (by Zambesi TN), Naughty Boy (by Lux Z), and Modinka (by Damiro) at 1.35m, and Solinka (by Julio Mariner xx) and Vobinka (by Pythagoras) at 1.30m. 

The great-granddam Dominka competed at 1.60m. She produced Zippit (by Berlin) at 1.60m, Tominka (by Calypso III) and Untouchable (by Baloubet du Rouet) at 1.35m, and Just You (by Purioso) and Carissimo Z (by Caridor Z), who both competed in CCI2* eventing.

The option to have the foal stay with the breeder after weaning is available.

SWEDISH
Modern Goïnka har egna tävlingsmeriter i 130 hoppning. 

Mormodern Idylle har lämnat ett flertal avkommor i svår klass. Sterrehof’s Edinus (e. Padinus) i 160 hoppning, Catinka 19 (e. Ovidius) och Aminka (e. Sam R) har tävlat i 150-klasser och Vanda Vuitton (e. SIEC Vigaro) och Undiamo (e. Andiamo) i 145 hoppning. Idylle har också lämnat Forinka (e. Zambesi TN), Naughty Boy (e. Lux Z) och Modinka (e. Damiro) 135 hoppning och Solinka (e. Julio Mariner xx) och Vobinka (e. Pythagoras) i 130 hoppning. 

Mormors mor Dominka har meriter i 160 hoppning. Hon har lämnat Zippit (e. Berlin) i 160 hoppning, Tominka (e. Calypso III) och Untouchable (e. Baloubet du Rouet) i 135 hoppning, Just You (e. Purioso) och Carissimo Z (e. Caridor Z) i CCI2* fälttävlan. 

Uppstallning/lösdrift erbjuds efter avvänjning.
